name: Dagger Froggy
short_description: Dagger Froggy is a small action Roguelike, Where you face hordes of enemies... Cute? With each round you get stronger, But so do the cute creatures. >:)
detailed_description:
Dagger Froggy is a small roguelike with very simple gameplay, throw the dagger at enemies and retrieve it to defeat the next one!, try to survive for 10 minutes, creating incredible builds!

FACE INCREASINGLY POWERFUL ENEMIES

The further you get, the more difficult enemies appear!

UPGRADES

At each end of the horde you choose between 4 improvements, which will help you survive against these adorable creatures.

There are 30 Base Improvements, which combine with each other, making incredible Combos!

SPECIALS

When you maximize an improvement, you release a Special. Each Special is unique and has effects that can improve your character or the daggers

THE FROGS

Each little frog has its own skills, so you can start with 2 points of some improvement, in addition to each one having its own unique style. 😎

THE SCENARIOS

Each Scenario/Map has its own style and can be unlocked as soon as you win a match on the previous map.

STORE

With the coins that fall from enemies, and those you earn after finishing a match, you can unlock improvement points, so you can start with some improvements now!
